problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
mechanism: Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure)
hypothesis: If Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure) is applied to fully, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
